contracts.name: ThreeTierTestEnvironmentPolicy
contracts.rule: L1=Dev ctest only; L2=Staging acceptance blocks prod promotion; L3=Prod smoke only. Full regression must never run in production.

contracts.name: L1ContractGateRunnerScopeCeiling
contracts.rule: L1 contract_gate_runner stops at stage ci; L2/L3 gates use registry --dry-run defaults; L2 bulk labels (integration, day14) are not day17 ctest commands.

contracts.name: DevCiFastGate
contracts.rule: PR/main L1: ctest -L day17; contract_gate_runner uses --through-stage ci only; GATE-TEST-L1-GATE-SCOPE enforces wiring.

contracts.name: StagingAcceptanceMandatory
contracts.rule: L2 exclusive post-deploy: ops/acceptance/staging scenarios (bulk integration/day14 labels). Not part of L1 contract_gate_runner full staging execution.

contracts.name: ProdSmokeOnly
contracts.rule: Production allows only ops/smoke/prod scenarios (non-destructive, short). Forbidden: ctest -L regression, contract_gate_runner full regression, manifest stress tests.

contracts.name: HermeticFileBackedIntegration
contracts.rule: File-backed reload integration tests use adapter/test/support/test_temp_dir.h; no fixed bs_* filenames in build CWD.

contracts.name: StagingProdTopologyParity
contracts.rule: Staging must mirror production: OS family, per-tenant manifest roots, plugin manifest path policy, and BS_STAGING_ROOT isolation.
